item.title: Ferrari’s Luce is a free option on a whole new market
item.description: Italian company’s valuation stacks up even if it never figures out a workable electric vehicle strategy

item.title: More than half of shadow fleet oil tankers pose environmental disaster risk
item.description: Ageing sanctioned ships should be scrapped, says leading ship recycler

item.title: Sandoz warns cheap Chinese imports threaten Europe’s antibiotic supply
item.description: Continent risks losing critical medicine capacity without stronger protections, says chief executive

item.title: Defence group CSG still pursuing stake in Franco-German tank maker
item.description: Czech ammunition manufacturer is in discussions with KNDS stakeholders, chief executive says

item.title: How Iran’s military harnesses ChatGPT
item.description: Western AI models are turbocharging Tehran’s cyber operations, helping it develop malware and launch attacks

item.title: China’s activewear boom puts spring in foreign brands’ step
item.description: Rapha and Lululemon among groups riding wave of interest in wellbeing

item.title: Top health official held shares in key children’s home operator
item.description: Samantha Jones, permanent secretary at the Department of Health and Social Care, had multiple private-sector interests

item.title: Race for rare earths sparks concern about environmental damage
item.description: Companies seeking to boost western supplies face legal and community obstacles

item.title: Jamming-resistant radio maker seeks $3bn-plus sale
item.description: Ukraine war has underlined importance of long-range data links that cannot be disrupted or intercepted

item.title: AI is here. What do you want from it?
item.description: The technology’s development belongs to everyone — share your vision with us

item.title: India’s ‘city of glass’ under pressure as Gulf crisis chokes off energy
item.description: Iran conflict threatens four-century tradition of glassmaking as industry tipped to use gas to power furnaces

item.title: Jes Staley to appear before Congress over ties to Jeffrey Epstein
item.description: Former Barclays boss agrees to in-person interview with US lawmakers over his relationship with paedophile

item.title: Paris Saint-Germain retain Champions League with victory over Arsenal
item.description: French club triumph in penalty shootout over London side in win for Gulf sovereign wealth over US capital

item.title: SoftBank pledges €75bn to build Europe’s biggest AI facility in France
item.description: Masayoshi Son places France at the centre of his global AI ambitions

item.title: Historic cattle shortages push US beef prices to record highs
item.description: High feed costs and drought have thinned herds to the lowest levels in 60 years as protein-hungry consumers drive demand

item.title: Crypto treasuries turn to risky equity in drive to raise cash
item.description: Companies that stock up on crypto assets are following Michael Saylor’s Strategy into so-called digital credit

item.title: Why does Castlelake want to buy easyJet?
item.description: Budget carrier has large fleet and expensive airport slots, while its share price has been hit by Iran crisis

item.description: Critics say John Elkann has detached the family empire from its home country

item.title: Toshifumi Suzuki, convenience store king, 1932-2026
item.description: At the helm of the Japanese 7-Eleven, he revolutionised the country’s retail industry

item.title: Wealth tax fears reignited by UK leadership uncertainty
item.description: Contenders Streeting and Burnham have both hinted at tax reforms

item.title: Top UK building societies plot bids for digital bank Atom
item.description: Fintech’s owners hope the business will fetch about $600mn but industry executives say final offers could be lower

item.title: JPMorgan chases retail banking’s golden fleece
item.description: US bank’s international expansion is gaining some traction

item.title: London Stadium back in spotlight after West Ham’s Premier League exit
item.description: East London club will pay less rent for venue that has struggled to satisfy public since 2012 Olympics

item.title: Your wine collection may be worth less than you think
item.description: There are three main factors when it comes to valuing a fine wine

item.title: UK military looks at allowing lethal strikes without human approval
item.description: Officials push for machines to make autonomous decisions on targets in exceptional circumstances

item.title: Should AI steal your job?
item.description: The real question is not what the technology can do but what it ought to do. Sarah O’Connor on the people fighting for the future of work

item.title: How the Enhanced Games tripped over its own shoelaces
item.description: A business once valued at $1.2bn is now worth just $350mn

item.title: China’s coal heartlands reel from worst disaster in a decade
item.description: Deaths of 82 miners recall era of accidents many hoped was in the past
